name: Peter Paul Abillar Lazan
title: Full-Stack Developer | IT Support Specialist | IT Systems & Credential Administrator
summary: Full-Stack Developer, Mobile App DevOps, and IT Systems & Credential Administrator with hands-on experience in web and mobile application development, database management, network administration, and system access management. Skilled in building secure, responsive, and data-driven systems using React, Node.js, TypeScript, and MySQL. Experienced in iOS/Android app deployment, CI/CD pipelines, Supabase backend management, and project coordination using Plane.so. Demonstrates strong problem-solving, adaptability, and collaboration skills with a security-first mindset. Eager to contribute to a dynamic organization by delivering innovative solutions and ensuring system security and operational excellence.
